# AbsolutelySkilled

> A registry of 168+ production-ready skills for AI coding agents like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and OpenAI Codex. Skills teach AI agents specialized knowledge across software engineering, marketing, design, operations, and more.

## Skills Categories

- [engineering](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/engineering): 45 skills
- [operations](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/operations): 27 skills
- [marketing](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/marketing): 23 skills
- [ai-ml](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/ai-ml): 10 skills
- [design](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/design): 9 skills
- [devtools](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/devtools): 9 skills
- [product](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/product): 8 skills
- [sales](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/sales): 7 skills
- [data](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/data): 6 skills
- [video](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/video): 5 skills
- [infra](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/infra): 4 skills
- [cloud](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/cloud): 3 skills
- [monitoring](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/monitoring): 3 skills
- [writing](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/writing): 2 skills
- [workflow](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/workflow): 2 skills
- [analytics](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/analytics): 2 skills
- [developer-tools](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/developer-tools): 1 skills
- [communication](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/communication): 1 skills
- [game-development](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/category/game-development): 1 skills

## Key Pages

- [All Skills](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/skills): Browse and search all 168 skills
- [Blog](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/blog): Guides and tutorials
- [GitHub](https://github.com/AbsolutelySkilled/AbsolutelySkilled): Source code and contributions

## Install Any Skill

```
npx skills add AbsolutelySkilled/AbsolutelySkilled --skill <skill-name>
```

## Optional

- [Full skill catalog](https://absolutely-skilled.vercel.app/llms-full.txt): Complete details for every skill
